mapper.sql: select v.id, v.production_year, v.batch_id, v.pro_batch_no, v.sub_version_code, v.product, v.manual_task_no, v.manual_task_name, v.version_type, v.sys_name, v.base_version_code, v.out_lib_version, v.version_code, v.out_version, v.comm_name, u.nick_name as user_name, v.version_p_date, v.is_involved, v.db_update, v.usb_update, v.package_mode, v.version_status, v.version_brief, v.version_descr, v.remarks, v.manual_input, v.create_by, v.create_time, v.update_by, v.update_time, v.remark, cu.nick_name as create_by_name, mu.nick_name as update_by_name, (select group_concat(distinct pt.software_demand_no separator ', ') from pm_version_out_task vt left join pm_task pt on vt.task_id = pt.task_id where vt.version_id = v.id) as task_nos from pm_version_out v left join sys_user u on v.comm_name = u.user_id left join sys_user cu on v.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = cu.user_name left join sys_user mu on v.update_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = mu.user_name
mapper.insert: insert into pm_version_out( production_year, batch_id, pro_batch_no, sub_version_code, product, manual_task_no, manual_task_name, version_type, sys_name, base_version_code, out_lib_version, version_code, out_version, comm_name, version_p_date, is_involved, db_update, usb_update, version_descr, remarks, manual_input, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values( #{productionYear}, #{batchId}, #{proBatchNo}, #{subVersionCode}, #{product}, #{manualTaskNo}, #{manualTaskName}, #{versionType}, #{sysName}, #{baseVersionCode}, #{outLibVersion}, #{versionCode}, #{outVersion}, #{commName}, #{versionPDate}, #{isInvolved}, #{dbUpdate}, #{usbUpdate}, #{versionDescr}, #{remarks}, '1', '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.select: select t.id, t.version_id, t.task_id, pt.software_demand_no as task_no, pt.task_name, pt.demand_name, pj.project_name as prj_name from pm_version_out_task t left join pm_task pt on t.task_id = pt.task_id left join pm_project pj on pt.project_id = pj.project_id where t.version_id = #{versionId}
mapper.insert: insert into pm_version_out( production_year, batch_id, pro_batch_no, sub_version_code, product, version_type, sys_name, base_version_code, out_lib_version, version_code, out_version, comm_name, version_p_date, is_involved, db_update, usb_update, package_mode, version_status, version_brief, version_descr, remarks, manual_input, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values( #{productionYear}, #{batchId}, #{proBatchNo}, #{subVersionCode}, #{product}, #{versionType}, #{sysName}, #{baseVersionCode}, #{outLibVersion}, #{versionCode}, #{outVersion}, #{commName}, #{versionPDate}, #{isInvolved}, #{dbUpdate}, #{usbUpdate}, #{packageMode}, #{versionStatus}, #{versionBrief}, #{versionDescr}, #{remarks}, '0', '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update pm_version_out set del_flag = '1', out_lib_version = concat(out_lib_version, '_DEL_', id) where id in #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from pm_version_out_task where version_id in #{vid}
mapper.select: select coalesce(max(cast(version_code as unsigned)), 0) from pm_version_out where del_flag = '0' and sub_version_code = #{subVersionCode} and version_type = #{versionType} and out_lib_version like concat('T\_', year(now()), '\_%')
select batch_id as batchId, batch_no as batchNo, plan_production_date as planProductionDate from pm_production_batch where production_year = #{productionYear} order by sort_order
select date_format(plan_production_date, '%Y-%m-%d') from pm_production_batch where batch_id = #{batchId}

select pt.task_id, pt.software_demand_no as task_no, pt.task_name, pt.demand_name, pj.project_name as prj_name from pm_task pt left join pm_project pj on pt.project_id = pj.project_id where pt.software_demand_no = #{softwareDemandNo} limit 1
select distinct out_version from pm_version_out where del_flag = '0' and sys_name = #{sysName} and version_type = #{versionType} and out_version is not null and out_version != '' order by out_version
